commands: vp env install --node 22 ./test-pkg # Install with Node.js 22
vp env packages --json | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); console.log('Node major:', d[0].platform.node.split('.')[0])" # Verify Node 22
vp env install --node 20 ./test-pkg # Install with Node.js 20
vp env packages --json | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); console.log('Node major:', d[0].platform.node.split('.')[0])" # Verify Node 20
